title: ExpressionExecutor type mismatch
description:
### What happens?

DuckDB triggers an INTERNAL Error "ExpressionExecutor::Execute called with a result vector of type INTEGER that does not match expression type DOUBLE" when executing a query with multiple tables, CROSS JOIN, and subqueries that involve type inference mismatches.


### To Reproduce

```sql
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 INT);
CREATE TABLE t1(c0 INT);
CREATE TABLE t2(c2 DOUBLE);

INSERT INTO t1(c0) VALUES (1);
INSERT INTO t2(c2) VALUES (7.5);
INSERT INTO t0(c0) VALUES (0);

SELECT * FROM t0, t2, t1, (SELECT DISTINCT t1.c0 AS col_0, t2.c2 AS col_1 FROM t1) as subQuery0 CROSS JOIN (SELECT t0.c0 AS col_0);
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3(c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR(255));
CREATE TABLE t4(c0 DOUBLE, c1 BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t4(c0, c1) VALUES (3.5, TRUE), (4.2, FALSE);
SELECT * FROM t3 CROSS JOIN (SELECT c0, c1 FROM t4 WHERE c1 IS NOT NULL) AS subQuery1;
key_bug_features: CROSS JOIN with type inference mismatches in queries
